sourceMovie.title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest for the same reason it broke through in 1975: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Miloš Forman keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: The Green Mile
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest clicked for you, The Green Mile (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: GoodFellas
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest clicked for you, GoodFellas (1990) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest?
faq.answer: Try The Green Mile, GoodFellas, Full Metal Jacket—each shares DNA with One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest?
faq.answer: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest (1975) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
